events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young and still making musical magic. Happy birthday to the iconic Sir Paul McCartney!

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful voice and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: That incredible voice turns 65! Celebrating the brilliant Alison Moyet and her timeless tracks today.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy Award-winning singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for his smooth hits and Commodores legacy, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday, celebrating a true music legend.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, famous for her distinctive style and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi's Fun
angles.copy: Still having fun after all these years! Wishing a very happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: A voice that defined generations. Remembering George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, in Los Angeles.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: Seventeen years on, the music and magic of Michael Jackson continue to thrill. Remembering the King of Pop today.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love Ringo
angles.copy: Eighty-six years of peace and love! Happy birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God May
angles.copy: From stadium rock to the stars, celebrating the incredible Brian May on his 79th birthday. What a legend!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, the enduring icon of rock and roll, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Moves
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger, rock and roll's eternal frontman.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV, the music television channel that changed the industry, launched on this day in 1981 with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV Changed Everything
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, a channel launched that changed music forever. Remember MTV's first ever video?

events.title: 32 years since Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became a defining record of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Peace, love, and music. Fifty-seven years ago today, Woodstock began its legendary run. Imagine being there!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, the legend of Elvis Presley lives on. Remembering The King today.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, a true innovator of rock music.

angles.name: Hendrix Lives On
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost a guitar genius. Jimi Hendrix's influence is still as powerful as ever.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Rock Spirit
angles.copy: Still rockin' at 75! Happy birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde, a true original.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher, known for his distinctive vocals and swagger, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock and roll! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. As you were.
